channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: The ‘wash trading’ bust: Why the feds are finally calling out crypto’s dirty little liquidity secret
item.description: An FBI-created token helped expose how firms allegedly engineered fake volume and why the incentives behind it remain deeply entrenched

item.title: Crypto markets tumble as oil surges and traders pile into bearish bets: Crypto Markets Today
item.description: Bitcoin and ether fell sharply alongside global risk assets after escalating tension in Iran drove oil higher, while derivatives data shows traders positioning for further downside.

item.title: Polymarket fee expansion boosts revenue amid regulatory pressure
item.description: Polymarket’s March 30 fee overhaul lifted daily fees and revenue, but how long the spike lasts is unclear as regulatory pressure builds.

item.title: Drift explains $280M exploit as critics question Circle over USDC freeze
item.description: Drift said a durable nonce attack helped drive its Solana exploit, as critics questioned why stolen USDC moved for hours without a freeze.

item.title: Metaplanet buys 5,075 Bitcoin in Q1 to become 3rd-largest treasury
item.description: Metaplanet lifted its Bitcoin holdings to 40,177 in Q1 after buying over $400 million of BTC to become the third-largest BTC treasury.

item.title: Bitcoin, Gold, and U.S. Stocks Dive as Trump Pledges to Hit Iran ‘Extremely Hard’
item.description: Markets slumped as Trump claimed the Iran war was “nearing completion” while offering no clear plan to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: The bitcoin treasury boom is unwinding as some companies and governments sell holdings
item.description: Falling prices and prolonged consolidation are pushing public firms and sovereign holders to liquidate bitcoin reserves to shore up balance sheets.

item.title: Beyond T-bills: OpenEden introduces tokenized high-yield corporate bond
item.description: The product further expands the tokenized real-world asset market beyond cash-equivalent and treasury strategies, which currently dominate the sector.

item.title: Coinbase exec says Senate CLARITY compromise is close, but no markup date set
item.description: Coinbase legal chief Paul Grewal says US lawmakers are nearing agreement on the CLARITY Act, with a Senate markup expected soon.

item.title: Metaplanet acquires 5,075 BTC, jumps to third largest bitcoin treasury company
item.description: Japan-based firm strengthens its position with nearly $400 million purchase, surpassing MARA Holdings in global rankings.

item.title: XRP price down nearly 30% in 2026 as chart flashes $1 warning
item.description: XRP price charts remained bearish amid increasing signs that the $1 level could be tested as support in the coming weeks.

item.title: Bitcoin risks new lows as US dollar targets highest level since April 2025
item.description: Bitcoin fell on fresh US-Iran cues, while analysis warned that a resurgent US dollar could spark new lows across crypto and risk assets.

item.title: 🇹🇼 TODAY: The Bitcoin Policy Institute says Taiwan should build a Bitcoin reserve to hedge against global turmoil and the risk of war. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE0wN2ZuQ2JqNEhPWWF1MTVKdXRYQ1BUWmphdUt2WGcza2V4eGRpSnhDdDJZYUR2WFhpTmpNbFJSUnVXTWRleHo4OGRKbGl4RlBxOVB0S25iM1JPcTc5T0RUUGtSYWk?oc=5" target="_blank">🇹🇼 TODAY: The Bitcoin Policy …

item.title: Chainalysis、初のブロックチェーン・インテリジェンス・エージェントを発表
item.description: ※この記事は自動翻訳されています。正確な内容につきましては原文をご参照ください。 悪意のあるアクターはすでに AI を駆使し、詐欺、窃盗、マネーロンダリングを加速させています。対抗する側には、それを上回るスピードが求められます。 本日、イベント Links にて、Chainalysis の新たなステージとなる「ブロックチェーン・インテリジェンス・エージェント」を発表しました。新製品でも、後付けのチャットボット機能でもありません。数十億件のスクリーニング済みトランザクション、…

item.title: Ripple Treasury puts XRP and RLUSD inside corporate finance for the first time
item.description: The treasury management system, built on Ripple's 2025 acquisition of GTreasury, lets CFOs view and manage digital assets alongside fiat in a single dashboard without separate custody or wallet infrastructure.

item.title: Former FTX head of engineering fined $3.7M to resolve CFTC lawsuit
item.description: Singh faced legal action from the SEC, CFTC and US Department of Justice after FTX collapsed in November 2022 but avoided significant prison time by cooperating with authorities.

item.title: Alabama becomes second US state to grant DAOs legal status under DUNA
item.description: The legislation “embraces innovation, protects participants and empowers internet-native communities to compete with big tech incumbents,” said a16z’s Miles Jennings.

item.title: Bitcoin traders keep chasing Trump’s Iran noise. The real signals are elsewhere.
item.description: Bitcoin and other risk assets have been whipsawed by President Donald J. Trump’s shifting rhetoric on Iran. Here are some indicators that help cut through the noise.

item.title: Crypto VC Paradigm is developing a prediction market terminal: Fortune
item.description: As part of the offering, Paradigm is also exploring an internal market-making desk for prediction market trading and a prediction market index.

item.title: Update: $230M+ USDC bridged via CCTP from Solana to Ethereum across 100+ txns. 6 hours is how long Circle had to freeze stolen funds from the $280M+ Drift hack. Circle is a centralized stablecoin issuer headquartered in New York and the attack began a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9lT0g4c3FkRWdBOTN6Q0dnVjNnMkRsQm5jQm1EUnh2NkhuNDRnWkw2X1hRYkEtUFBSQkd0bVBVTXRRbXJuamZkUUZfdVhuNXRRWGdCa3dPdWxhTlVC?oc=5" target="_blank">Update: $230M+ USDC bridged via CCTP from …

item.title: Genius Group liquidates Bitcoin treasury to pay $8.5M of debt
item.description: The AI and crypto company has added to a pattern of Bitcoin treasuries offloading this year, with Michael Saylor's Strategy bucking that trend.

item.title: Oil trader takes $17 million hit as tokenized crude rivals bitcoin liquidations
item.description: Brent crude futures on Hyperliquid recorded $46.6 million in liquidations, behind only ether and bitcoin. The single largest liquidation was a $17.17 million oil position.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether, solana slide further as Trump threatens to hit Iran 'extremely hard'
item.description: Crypto and equities sold off after the president's national address undermined a two-day rally built on expectations the war was ending. Oil jumped 5% to above $106.

item.title: Alleged Huione money-laundering boss extradited to China
item.description: Huione Group helped launder funds from Southeast Asian scam networks behind “pig butchering” schemes and other crypto scams.

item.title: Taiwan should reconsider Bitcoin reserve in case of war, says think tank
item.description: Taiwanese lawmaker Ko Ju-Chun said last year that the country’s Ministry of Justice holds 210 Bitcoins, worth $14 million, confiscated during criminal investigations.

item.title: Bitcoin dips, oil rises as Trump addresses nation on war in Iran
item.description: US President Donald Trump said the military is "very close" to finishing its war in Iran in a speech that saw oil and Bitcoin prices move.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls below $67,000 as US stock market futures hit a new low of day. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9mWFhjc3pzbkU2eDFjVUt1dXdYSTVqdWJ1SVZHRUp3b3RwZXlaaUNWUUxiMDdITjlrTnRnZXY0cXhWeDczdHJxTDhYbDBSNElQbjZXbGdLNmpRR3VyMkk3WnNjVlp3Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin falls belo…

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $67,000 after President Trump says he will "finish the job" in the war against Iran. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5vSGFLNVRrek0xVFg5UnlXSEJMQmhLcWlYZ0xCckFHXy1udWJtSEdLUzdBMDVZNGg4a1FScmFiNS1QUjZua0dYM0lKSkNVS0dWd3hoWDhOUlJZek8zRkowcExR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $67,0…

item.title: 🇮🇷 LATEST: Iran's IRGC is charging ships in yuan or crypto to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, Bloomberg reports. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBQVGRXZGpNNEVqU3JVOU5hLWpCNkNkTjJPdXd5Y2E0cUlSRU5xa3ZVOXJyaEdudWZDdllESnVIcmNaSDZmb293Z1pZNUZYQm9DTWw0Rk9NX2loMGVYalFhc1p5WUw?oc=5" target="_blank">🇮🇷 LATEST: Iran's IRGC is cha…

item.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX quietly files for IPO, seeking mammoth debut: Report
item.description: A valuation above $1.75 trillion would rank SpaceX among the largest public companies in the US, above several major tech names at current market values.

item.title: 🚨 UPDATE: Bitcoin buying is failing to offset a wave of selling by large holders, with $BTC trading at $68,217 and down 22% year to date, per Bloomberg. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE50S19nck1YVEdObTd1VnBBNWdBVHFLU3AxcGpPRHpXMGtqNkQ5dVRVMW5saUNiVFdXZlFtWHVXNGFkeVg0QTJsQ0E2Nnotc3hwYjlpSmZkTFJsUlNOSVBpZmFsWVI?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 UPDATE: Bitcoin buying is fa…

item.title: Crypto exchange Bithumb to delay IPO until after 2028: Report
item.description: According to the company CFO, Bithumb was “strengthen[ing] accounting policies and internal controls” ahead of its IPO plans, already delayed from 2025.

item.title: US Treasury seeks public input for state-level stablecoin regulations
item.description: The Treasury published its notice of proposed rulemaking for states on dollar-pegged stablecoins with market caps of less than $10 billion

item.title: These Three Altcoins Just Got Leveraged Crypto ETFs
item.description: Volatility Shares, the company that launched the first leveraged crypto fund in the U.S., is expanding its roster to smaller digital assets

item.title: Hyperliquid whale makes $80M bet on market crash: Is Bitcoin in trouble?
item.description: An $80 million leveraged position includes a Bitcoin short and a long bet on oil prices, though the trader has a history of large losses.

item.title: EDX seeks OCC trust bank charter for institutional crypto custody
item.description: The crypto exchange seeks a charter from the US Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to separate custody from trading and expand services under a regulated banking framework.

item.title: JUST IN: Solana-based crypto DEX 'Drift Protocol' says $270,000,000 hack is "not an April fools joke." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBBMFdNbWFQNm1DQk5QcWxFZTZuamNiTkZKLUdqUEJhLXo5RmFoMlYwTE0wX21KM1djd05Da2ZJeXU3VEFQNmRUaU1YNFJlSGdFckwxYXI2eWVJcVN6Tm56UUd3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Solana-based crypto DEX '…

item.title: Solana DeFi Exchange Drift Protocol Exploited, Upwards of $285 Million Stolen
item.description: Solana-based perpetuals DEX Drift Protocol has suffered an exploit impacting more than $200 million in funds.

item.title: Pro-crypto PAC to be headed by Tether executive ahead of US midterms
item.description: A debate over stablecoin yield, likely to impact Tether, is underway in the US government as lawmakers consider a market structure bill.

item.title: Google's Veo 3.1 Lite Cuts API Costs in Half as OpenAI's Sora Exits the Market
item.description: Google's cheapest video model yet targets developers burned by high generation costs, arriving just days after OpenAI pulled the plug on Sora.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Citadel-backed EDX Markets applies for U.S. trust charter to expand institutional crypto services
item.description: The Citadel-backed exchange is seeking approval to offer custody and asset services as institutional demand grows.

item.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX Files Confidentially for Record-Breaking $1.75 Trillion IPO
item.description: Elon Musk’s rocket company has confidentially submitted IPO paperwork to U.S. regulators, potentially setting up one of the largest public listings in history.

item.title: Solana DeFi platform Drift confirms 'active attack' as $200M+ leaves platform
item.description: The platform halted deposits while it investigates suspicious activity and urges users to proceed with caution.

item.title: Fed's Barr Says Stablecoins Need Tighter Controls to Fight Money Laundering
item.description: The Fed governor has previously said that stablecoins risk undermining the U.S. central bank’s credibility.

item.title: Galaxy Digital's testnet suffers hack but no client funds or information were compromised
item.description: Mike Novogratz’s crypto financial services firm said unauthorized access was limited to a segregated R&D workspace; trading systems and client accounts were unaffected.

item.title: Cambodia Extradites Alleged Huione Crypto Scam Kingpin to China: Report
item.description: Chinese authorities have arrested Li Xiong, former chairman of Huione Group, linked by U.S. regulators to billions in illicit crypto flows.

item.title: JUST IN: A Bitcoin & crypto exchange backed by Citadel Securities applied to be a national trust bank 👀 🇺🇸 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9CX2lORkREZnB4NncxOGVWdGRLOWI5RVNBY3BsNUlNeWp5ckVjaEZ5NkNyM2s3M3pJS0VxNHpzdHp2dHg5RlRTblpLajlJNjZMd3o4NkRUWVFNU2tob3A4cnd3NHFSQzA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: A Bitcoin & crypto…

item.title: The Quantum Threat to Bitcoin Dividing Crypto
item.description: Two papers published this week have reignited debates about the risk posed by “Q-day” to the cryptography that underpins digital assets.

item.title: 🚨🗞️NEW: Bitcoin-Backed Muni Bond Gets First Moody’s Rating; Stablecoin Yield Text Delayed Lots of news this Wednesday. Read it all in today’s @CryptoAmerica_ newsletter from yours truly. ⬇️ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE16b3pUaHkwa2ZFVHFtZWZnczB2TjRhWnRIUlc4MUxGbFBoWXFhX3RyN0R4UDNWZmYxYWVvbnpITF85YkFQVTVkcEhzc25pMG5DNG41TllaT1ZJUTRoLVRRU3dxUDZuQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨🗞️NEW: Bitcoin-Backed Mun…

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: Governance is the real Layer 1
item.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Nilmini Rubin writes on the challenge facing crypto and traditional markets to create a hybrid, shared governance structure. Then, Meredith Fitzpatrick covers how financial institutions must f…

item.title: Bitcoin Gets Its First Bond Rating as Moody's Grades New Hampshire Deal
item.description: Moody's has rated a New Hampshire Bitcoin-backed bond—a first for BTC as direct bond collateral.

item.title: The Protocol: Quantum computing could break Bitcoin sooner, says Google
item.description: Also: OpenAI raises $122 billion, crypto ecosystems diverging post-quantum strategies, and Base’s 2026 roadmap.

item.title: Jamie Dimon signals JPMorgan entry into prediction markets as competition surges
item.description: JPMorgan is weighing a move into prediction markets as crypto firms, startups and rivals like Goldman Sachs race to dominate the fast-growing sector.

item.title: Cango raises capital as it faces NYSE delisting risk with shares below $1
item.description: The bitcoin miner issued a $10 million convertible note and closed a $65 million insider-led round while racing to regain compliance with exchange rules.

item.title: Franklin Templeton to Buy CoinFund Spinoff, Build Out Crypto Investment Offering
item.description: Global asset manager Franklin Templeton is acquiring a CoinFund spinoff to build out its own crypto wing, Franklin Crypto.

item.title: Agencies Must Create Clear Prediction Market Rules to Avoid FTX-Style ‘Implosions’: CFTC Chair
item.description: Michael Selig argued that prediction markets operating offshore in “unregulated space” could lead to an FTX-style collapse.

item.title: Ripple Launches Treasury Management System with Native Digital Asset Capabilities
item.description: The novel platform allows CFOs and their treasury teams to manage fiat and digital assets in a single system, Ripple said.

item.title: As one of the leading crypto companies, we care deeply about innovation. With innovation comes change - sometimes unwelcome change. In a rapidly evolving world, it's important that the pump fun brand stays not only in touch with culture, but continues to sh - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTE9jZTJwM1c5MTJjdDRMWGhJX05fYmYxUXFrQmVValNLSFlQWkZVQmtGZjNtWVpYTV9DUG9sTWx5WEZHQURSQThycW1zbU85TVl5NXhFNUVhbEJZV1Vz?oc=5" target="_blank">As one of the leading crypto companies, we…

item.title: Franklin Templeton launches crypto division with 250 Digital acquisition
item.description: The asset manager is creating a new “Franklin Crypto” unit to expand beyond ETFs and target institutional demand for active digital asset strategies.
